description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【Event Ended】

Hanno City held briefing sessions on the emergency financial measures and operational reforms. Sessions were held at Hanno City Hall Annex on January 17–18, 2026 (Reiwa 8), and then at community centers throughout the city from February 9 to February 28, 2026. No advance registration was required, but all sessions have now concluded.

Distribution materials and records from each session are available on the city website. You can also view the finalized operational reforms review sheet (確定版).

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/zaiseika/kinkyuuzaiseitaisaku/12708.html
summary: ℹ️ Emergency Financial Measures Briefing Sessions — Now Concluded
